draft.conclusion: 评审结论：逐项核验完成，可以合并。

findings.problem: Confirm the empty case crashed because dual_coef_indptr uses np.arange with step size/n_class == 0, and the n_SV == 0 guard short-circuits exactly that. arange 0 步长 0 step zero n_sv 空 indptr 空 zerodivision
findings.evidence: When there are no support vectors dual_coef_indices is empty, so the arange step is 0 and raises; the new branch avoids building indptr at all. dual_coef_indices building
findings.impact: When there are no support vectors dual_coef_indices is empty, so the arange step is 0 and raises; the new branch avoids building indptr at all. dual_coef_indices building
findings.fix: No change needed. Optionally confirm with an SVR fit that yields zero support vectors. optionally confirm

findings.problem: Confirm the else branch preserves the original CSR construction, so non-empty fits are unaffected. else 不变 正常 不变 原有 保留 else unchanged normal unchanged non-empty same
findings.evidence: The patch only adds a branch for n_SV == 0; the existing indptr/csr_matrix logic is moved verbatim into else. csr_matrix existing
findings.impact: The patch only adds a branch for n_SV == 0; the existing indptr/csr_matrix logic is moved verbatim into else. csr_matrix existing
findings.fix: No change needed. else 不变
